title: Add UTC info to Map Settings and local time display under UTC Offset Selection

requirements.summary: Add UTC info display under the 'Map Settings' section in WebsiteLayoutPanel showing the currently selected UTC offset in format 'UTC+08:00: 14:30:45'
acceptanceCriteria: UTC info appears under the Map Settings section in WebsiteLayoutPanel
Format matches the local time display format used elsewhere
Updates dynamically when UTC offset changes

file_operations.description: Add a UTC time display section below the existing Map Settings content. Import and use React state/effect hooks to track the current UTC offset from the parent LocationMapExplorer (pass as prop). Format and display the current time with the UTC offset prefix (e.g., 'UTC+08:00: 14:30:45'). Implement a timer using setInterval to update the time display every second. Ensure the display updates when the UTC offset prop changes.

requirements.summary: Add local time display directly under the 'UTC Offset Selection' button in LocationMapExplorer using the same format as Map Settings ('UTC+08:00: 14:30:45')
acceptanceCriteria: Local time display appears directly beneath the UTC Offset Selection button
Format is identical to the time display in Map Settings
Time updates in real-time based on selected UTC offset
Display is positioned within the XPath element /html[1]/body[1]/div[3]/div[2]/div[2]/div[2]/div[1]/div[2]/div[2]

file_operations.description: Add a local time display component directly below the UTC Offset Selection Button (inside the same container div). Use the current utcOffsetHours state to format and display the time with UTC offset prefix (e.g., 'UTC+08:00: 14:30:45'). Implement a timer using setInterval/useEffect to update the displayed time every second. Pass the utcOffsetHours state as a prop to WebsiteLayoutPanel so REQ-1 can display the same offset. Ensure the time calculation correctly handles fractional offsets (e.g., +05:30, +05:45).
